Notice Of Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Trademark Global, Llc
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement as to defendant Trademark Global, LLC is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
